review: A friend recommended this place. We had never been to a Peruvian restaurant. The atmosphere was perfect!  The service was great! The food was truly delicious!  They have a huge wine list with wines from all over the world!! I had the Lomo Saltado as recommended by the waitress and it was perfect!  My fiancé had a Bistec a Lo Pobre which he loved! (Pic included).  We loved the "green" rice!  The plates were well presented and we all enjoyed our dinner, total 6 of us! We already recommended to friends and family and will be returning!
